methodsAttempted.query: site:haifa.ac.il בינה מלאכותית אוניברסיטת חיפה סטודנטים הנחיות ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: Hebrew official-domain search surfaced the e-learning unit page on digital tools and artificial intelligence, which was verified as teaching-support evidence.

Hebrew official-domain search surfaced a Faculty of Education Technologies program page and a program academic-integrity page. The AI-related program page was kept as program-scoped teaching/curriculum evidence; the academic-integrity page was not used for AI-specific claims.

Firecrawl successfully scraped the official e-learning unit page with status 200. Direct curl HEAD/robots checks from this worker reset before HTTP response, so the staged fetch mode is recorded as Firecrawl.
Firecrawl successfully scraped the official Education Technologies program page with status 200. Claims are scoped to the program page and do not assert a university-wide binding policy.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery verified University of Haifa Hebrew teaching-support and program pages about AI, but did not verify a central binding university-wide generative-AI policy. Rejected official sources were research centers, publication metadata, news/research advisories, or non-AI-specific academic-integrity pages.

artifacts.title: University of Haifa AI Teaching Resource Staging Notes
artifacts.summary: Staged University of Haifa claims are limited to official Hebrew teaching-support and program pages: the e-learning unit's digital tools and AI resource for lecturers, and the Education Technologies program's AI-era curriculum description. No central binding university-wide generative-AI policy was verified in this run.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
This run did not verify a central binding University of Haifa generative-AI policy.
The e-learning unit page is a resource/tool guidance page for lecturers; it is not treated as an approved-tools mandate.
The Education Technologies page is program-scoped and must not be generalized to all University of Haifa courses.
Direct curl HEAD and robots checks from this worker reset before HTTP response; Firecrawl successfully retrieved the two evidence pages and was recorded as the successful fetch mode.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
